hooks.command: INPUT=$(cat); if echo "$INPUT" | jq -r '.tool_input.command' 2>/dev/null | grep -q 'git commit'; then BRANCH=$(git branch --show-current 2>/dev/null); if [ "$BRANCH" = 'main' ] || [ "$BRANCH" = 'primary' ] || [ "$BRANCH" = 'master' ]; then echo "WARNING: You are on the $BRANCH branch. Switch to a feature branch before committing." >&2; exit 1; fi; UNSTAGED=$(git diff --name-only 2>/dev/null | wc -l | tr -d ' '); UNTRACKED=$(git ls-files --others --exclude-standard 2>/dev/null | wc -l | tr -d ' '); if [ "$UNSTAGED" -gt 0 ] || [ "$UNTRACKED" -gt 0 ]; then echo "Note: $UNSTAGED unstaged changes, $UNTRACKED untracked files. Stage specific files rather than using git add -A."; fi; fi

INPUT=$(cat); if echo "$INPUT" | jq -r '.tool_input.command' 2>/dev/null | grep -q 'npm publish'; then BRANCH=$(git branch --show-current 2>/dev/null); if [ "$BRANCH" = 'main' ] || [ "$BRANCH" = 'primary' ] || [ "$BRANCH" = 'master' ]; then echo "WARNING: Do not publish from the $BRANCH branch. Use a release branch." >&2; exit 1; fi; NPM_USER=$(npm whoami 2>&1); if echo "$NPM_USER" | grep -qi 'error\|unauthorized\|ENEEDAUTH'; then echo "ERROR: npm auth failed ($NPM_USER). Run npm login first." >&2; exit 1; fi; echo "npm auth OK as $NPM_USER, branch OK."; fi

statusLine.command: input=$(cat); dir=$(basename "$(echo "$input" | jq -r '.workspace.current_dir')"); model=$(echo "$input" | jq -r '.model.display_name'); used=$(echo "$input" | jq -r '.context_window.used_percentage // empty'); ctx=""; if [ -n "$used" ]; then pct=$(printf '%.0f' "$used"); filled=$(( pct * 10 / 100 )); empty=$(( 10 - filled )); bar=""; i=0; while [ $i -lt $filled ]; do bar="${bar}█"; i=$(( i + 1 )); done; i=0; while [ $i -lt $empty ]; do bar="${bar}░"; i=$(( i + 1 )); done; ctx=" | [${bar}] ${pct}%"; fi; printf '\033[2m%s | %s%s\033[0m' "$dir" "$model" "$ctx"
